title: Looking for buyer of my Profitable ML Trading Model
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I’m selling my profitable **BTC trading model (full source code)** because of low funds. Some basic statistics of my model are:

* \~**10% average monthly return**
* **+140% this year** after **fees, slippage, funding**
* Tested on **5 years of historical BTC data**
* **4 months live trading**
* Current **LONG prediction is live and in profit** (image below)
* Will work on commodities also (**GOLD**)

My model is not any kind of traditional ema crossover tradingview indicator, it is a pure ML structure that handles all signal generation and trade execution work.

Why I’m selling:  
I **don’t have enough capital** to fully exploit it. Selling the code funds my trading account — simple as that. The profits I made so far is very little cause my capital was just a few hundred bucks.

I am looking for a potential buyer who is looking for a profitable model. And also my Model is adaptive to future markets as it is a ML based strategy that takes newer market data and learns from it overtime.

 Any serious buyer can direct message me for any queries. I will provide the source code to the buyer and every other scripts with proper understanding of how everything works.

  
My model report:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zFjMbZcW6Al-rr3xR0Kva1MI3qrO9wZ0/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zFjMbZcW6Al-rr3xR0Kva1MI3qrO9wZ0/view?usp=drive_link)

https://preview.redd.it/ey4b3vz94r8g1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=b48f908107644f625cd2f10f5a9d8f2a75fb1304

comments.author: Extra-Compote7143
comments.body: Drawdown is crazy high, no one would buy that model....

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: I agree but that was when BTC dropped by >60% in 2022. But at that period my model was just 20% which is fair I think.

replies.author: Extra-Compote7143
replies.body: Yeah sure, it's promising but you need at least one year live trading results for serious buyers

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: I am on its way. Live examining from April but actual live trading stats are from September.

comments.author: KD_Hub
comments.body: Not knocking the work, but if a model truly holds edge across regimes, selling the full source usually caps its lifespan once it’s reused or modified without discipline. What actually matters here isn’t the ML label, it’s how it handles regime shifts, position sizing, and drawdown control in live conditions - that’s where most models quietly fail. In practice, the strongest AI-driven systems I’ve seen are kept private and used as adaptive decision layers, not sold as standalone “profitable code.”

replies.author: UsualBlueberry12
replies.body: why sell a model thats 'proven profitable'

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: because i cant live the little profits generated from capital of few hundred bucks.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: My model perfectly holds its edge over different regime as the backtest contains the 2022 BEAR MARKET also the 2024 halving period, 250 days of range bound situation and many more. I am just selling the model cause I need capital for this model. And I know that there is no way one would give away a profitable model as they can print millions from it. But in my case I dont have thousands to make the millions. Having the sale will help me to get some funds for the model itself.

comments.author: Desalzes_
comments.body: gonna have to include the stats on that 4 months of live trading

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: All right I will include the live results in the report... Are you interested in it?

comments.author: UsualBlueberry12
comments.body:
from your report: "YES. Because even after giving >60% downfall in BEAR MARKET BTC always tends to go UP and record new ATH’s."

thats not really the point of a profitable trading bot imo.. if you think like this, also include the "Buy and Hold" from 2016 or 2020 for that matter :)

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
0My model beats Buy and Hold by many multiples.........

From the date of backtesting (2021-01-01) BTC was at \~29,000 and today it is at \~90,000  
And let's say i traded fixed 1 lot from that time using the model with capital of 29,000, my current closing balance is 266,930.  
That is to say buy-and-hold return is \[(90000-29000)/29000\] 210% but my model returns is at \[(260000-30000)/30000\] 766%. Even after including costs it is \~500%....... Clearly 2.5X more return. 

I am sorry to not include this data in the report also the backtest is from 2021-01-01 and not 2020-01-01.

It is really that profitable, the only problem is I dont have the enough funds to utilize it properly. That is why I want to sell it and have some capital.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I don't understand!

But to let you know it is surely profitable and adaptive with newer market data.

comments.author: Flat_Crew_3979
comments.body: Can I test drive for 5 days?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: In order to let you test it, I have to give the code, but I can't do that.... But I have a solution for you to check its authenticity.. dm me and let's talk..

comments.author: disaster_story_69
comments.body: I’ve got a bridge to sell you all too
